text: The new espresso machine is fantastic.
Battery dies after two hours of use.
Coffee tastes burnt and bitter.
Excellent build quality and quiet operation.
Customer service refused to help with the warranty.
It arrived broken and the box was crushed.
Works exactly as advertised and was easy to assemble.
Cleaning the unit is a nightmare.
Compact and lightweight, fits in my kitchen perfectly.
Great value for the price.
The director makes brave editing choices throughout.
Predictable plot with cardboard characters.
Visually stunning and emotionally honest.
The third act collapses under its own ambition.
Worth the price of admission just for the soundtrack.
I have seen this exact film a dozen times before.
Two unforgettable performances anchor the story.
The pacing is sluggish for almost the entire runtime.
A small, careful film about ordinary people.
Loud, dumb, and proud of it.
